title: Securing Your Social Media Accounts
content:
Securing Your Social Media Accounts

Securing your social media accounts is crucial in today's digital age. Use strong passwords and enable two-factor authentication.

Recommended Tools

  • Bitwarden: A secure, open-source password manager to generate and store strong, unique passwords for all your social media accounts.
  • Yubico YubiKey: A hardware security key that provides robust two-factor authentication (2FA) to prevent unauthorized access even if your password is compromised.
